title.en: The Force Demon Dao Ancestor was also furious.

content.en:
Ye Tian's forbidden realm was too powerful, even if he was as strong as the Demon Dao Ancestor, he couldn't easily break through the forbidden realm, so there was no way to escape from here quickly.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, are you afraid that you won't succeed?"

The Force Demon Dao Ancestor was also furious.

Rumble!!!!

The body of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor changed rapidly and dramatically, turning into a huge bull demon hundreds of millions of years high, this was his true body, an ancient chaotic life.

I saw that after the Force Demon Dao Ancestor turned into the main body, he crashed towards Ye Tian.

This collision was like the collapse of the universe, and the power of the vast sea crushed it.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian drank coldly, the Great Wilderness Law Body opened, and the selfless vacuum suppressed the void, and urged the forbidden body, holding the Ten Thousand True Spears, condensing the forbidden paths, and piercing through the spear one by one.

Burst!

The huge body of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor was directly pierced, and countless flesh and blood flew sideways.

At the same time, the power of the Forbidden Dao continued to invade the body of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor, destroying his internal structure.

"What, Taboo Dao!!!"

He was stunned.

It was incredible that a Supreme True Ancestor had comprehended the Forbidden Dao!

If it is said that a Supreme Dao Ancestor comprehends the Forbidden Dao, it is relatively normal, after all, the Supreme Dao Ancestor has obtained many opportunities, and it is still possible to comprehend a Forbidden Dao after a long time of comprehending the Forbidden Dao.

But how did Ye Tian comprehend the forbidden way, and his attainments didn't seem to be low.

Then he was terrified!

He underestimated Ye Tian's strength, where is this ordinary Supreme True Ancestor, he has almost reached the extreme of Supreme True Ancestor, and his strength is comparable to the combat power of an ordinary Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

And under the suppression of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, his strength could only exert the strength of the top Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Can't beat it!

The Force Demon Dao Ancestor wanted to escape, but he was suppressed by both the selfless vacuum and the forbidden realm, and it was difficult to escape at all, the key was that he didn't have any powerful escape treasure in his hand, so he couldn't escape.

So, he desperately worked!

Distance.

Seeing the battle between Ye Tian and the Force Demon Dao Ancestor, the Moon Shooting True Ancestor was immediately stunned.

He originally thought that Ye Tian would be able to contain the Force Demon Dao Ancestor a little and let the Force Demon Dao Ancestor leave in time, but he didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to suppress the Force Demon Dao Ancestor.

But I never expected that where this is evenly matched, it is not a slight suppression, but a hanging and crushing!

Looking at this situation, there is a possibility that the Force Demon Dao Ancestor will fall!

Thinking of this, the Moon Shooting True Ancestor gasped.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian still had to obey his arrangement, his strength was far inferior to him, but he didn't expect that how long it had passed, and he didn't even have the qualifications to look up to Ye Tian.

With Ye Tian's current strength, I'm afraid that blowing a breath can destroy him, and the difference in strength between the two sides has reached a world apart.

Time passed little by little, and the injuries of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor became more and more serious, coupled with the suppression of the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, his strength began to decline significantly.

His strength dropped all the way from the top Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor strength to-

High Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor Strength!

Medium Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor Strength!

Inferior Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor Strength!

Suddenly.

The strength of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor had dropped to the strength of the Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he was also in a state of serious injury and dying.

He knew that he couldn't live, so he temporarily dropped a cruel sentence: "Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, you will ...... sooner or later"

Before he could finish speaking, Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Evil True Spear passed directly through his giant mouth, and the blow pierced through his Ancient Bull Demon head, annihilating his last trace of vitality.

Force Demon Dao Ancestor, Fall!

When the Force Demon Dao Ancestor fell, many True Ancestors of the Immortal True Kingdom dared to approach, and they looked at the corpse of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor, and the terrifying life pressure still affected them, making them unable to even get close.

"Thank you Wanfa True Ancestor!"

The only surviving supreme true ancestor of the Immortal Sect, the Cloud Annihilation True Ancestor, flew over and said gratefully.

"It's okay, I'll leave first!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, put away the corpse of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor, and shuttled away in an instant.

He didn't dare to leave the Void Heaven True Kingdom for too long, in case other Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors attacked the Void Heaven True Kingdom, the Void Heaven True Kingdom would not be able to stop it.

After returning to the human race, Ye Tian began to send avatars to constantly patrol to prevent Dao Ancestor from infiltrating the Void Heaven True Country.

Disasters similar to the Immortal True Kingdom are happening all over the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, some Dao Ancestors have been killed, but more Dao Ancestors have no one to govern, the True Kingdom under the command of the Upper Triple Heaven Force is still relatively safe, but the True Kingdom under the command of the Dao Mountain Realm and the True Kingdom under the command of the Middle Triple Heaven Force have suffered.

Huoyan tabooly.

An ancient invincible Dao Ancestor appeared, and after slaughtering a large number of True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, he began to evolve the future path with the help of the Haotian Emperor Mirror.

In fact, they had indeed successfully evolved, and they had also shown the path of the half-step Domain Ancestor level in the future, allowing them to see the direction of the future clearly.

But it's one thing to see clearly, it's another thing to want to do it.

According to the future path of manifestation, these invincible Dao Ancestors had the hope of impacting the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, but it would take a long time to really reach the level of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

The only thing that made the invincible Dao Ancestors have substantial gains is that they have killed too many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, and confiscated the forbidden strange things on their bodies, which is a very considerable amount, which is enough to make up for the loss of their sect.

But some forces are more miserable, not to mention the fall of countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, and they have not reaped any benefits.

Some of the true ancestors of the Middle Triple Heaven Forces have fallen close to seventy or eighty percent, and the strength of the sect has dropped greatly.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

This year was almost a very dark year in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the true ancestors of the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm had fallen close to sixty percent, and the Dao Ancestors had fallen no less than three hundred thousand, of which the strongest Dao Ancestors had fallen seven or eight, and even the Invincible Dao Ancestors had been injured to varying degrees.

But even if they killed so many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, the invincible Dao Ancestors would not be able to evolve the path of the Domain Ancestor level, as if they were always a little bit close.

For this reason, the invincible Dao Ancestors fought each other.

They believed that by killing a few Invincible Dao Ancestors, they could sacrifice Invincible Dao Ancestors and evolve the path of the Domain Ancestor level.

At this time, many Invincible Dao Ancestors had gone crazy and completely lost their minds.

However, the strength of the invincible Dao Ancestors is almost the same, and it is difficult to distinguish the winner from the loser, and the ability to save their lives is too strong.

......

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The True Martial Palace Lord learned about the situation of Huoyan's forbidden land through a special way, and when he saw that the invincible Dao Ancestors wanted to evolve the Domain Ancestor Path through the Haotian Emperor Mirror, he couldn't help but laugh and said: "These Invincible Dao Ancestors still want to evolve the Domain Ancestor Path? The limit of the evolution of the Haotian Emperor Mirror is a half-step Domain Ancestor, and it is impossible to evolve the Domain Ancestor Path at all, otherwise our Haotian Sea Ancestor will not hand over the Haotian Emperor Mirror to us to take charge of!"

"They don't know about the Haotian Emperor Mirror, so they will naturally look forward to it!" The Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace said: "This time, too many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors have fallen, and the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has risen sharply, and the success rate of the birth of the Forbidden Realm has increased by at least three percent. And if it continues to evolve at this rate, it is estimated that it will not be long before the Xuanxu Ancient Realm can grow into the Ancient Realm!"

"It's a pity that an invincible Dao Ancestor didn't die this time!" said the True Martial Palace Master with regret.

"If the Half-Step Domain Ancestor doesn't make a move, the possibility of the Invincible Dao Ancestor falling is too low!" said the main Dao of the Blue Dragon Palace.

"Do you want me to make a move?" "Anyway, the Ancient Realm will be born in a short time, and the day of the birth of our Heavenly Emperor Palace will not be long before it, and the impact of making a move at this time is not very great!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord hesitated, and the White Tiger Palace Lord on the side also pondered.
